scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client" "npm run dev --workspace admin"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace client && npm run build --workspace admin && npm run build --workspace server
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace server && npm run test --workspace client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace client && npm run lint --workspace server
scripts.db:up: docker compose up -d postgres && echo Waiting for Postgres... && sleep 5 && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
